Defendant Shelter Creek Condominium Owners Association Notice Of Motion Motion To Strike Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Hewlett (415-515-7860) Plaintiff/Opposing party, in Pro Per.
Grant Baker (650-347-5000) of MBA Law Group for Defendant/Moving party SHELTER CREEK CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION.
Tom Lee (415-675-3400) of Bryan Cave LLP for Defendant J.P. Morgan Chase Bank, N.A.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. ARGUED re: failure to post bond prior to filing as vexatious litigant. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SHELTER CREEK CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION's Motion To Strike Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Hewlett (415-515-7860) Plaintiff/Opposing party, in Pro Per.

Grant Baker (650-347-5000) of MBA Law Group for Defendant SHELTER CREEK CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. ARGUED re: failure to post bond prior to filing as vexatious litigant. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Joinder In Defendant Shelter Creek Condominium Owners Associations Motion To Strike Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Continued To Jan-31-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Hewlett (415-515-7860) Plaintiff/ opposing party in pro per.
Grant Baker (650-347-5000) for Defendant/Moving Party Shelter Creek.
Goli Mahdavi (415-675-3447) for Defendant JP Morgan Chase.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the Motion to declare plaintiff a vexatious litigant. Hearing is held. Argued re: lawsuits filed in San Mateo. The Court denies plaintiff's request to reduce Bond amount. Defendant submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SHELTER CREEK CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each asserted cause of action, not barred by res judicata and/or collateral estoppel. Plaintiff shall have 40 days to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant, For Order To Furnish Security And For Pre-Filing Order
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Hewlett (415-515-7860) Plaintiff/ opposing party in pro per.
Grant Baker (650-347-5000) for Defendant Shelter Creek.
Goli Mahdavi (415-675-3447) for Defendant/Moving Party JP Morgan Chase.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the Demurrur to complaint. Hearing is held. Argued re: lawsuits filed in San Mateo. The Court denies plaintiff's request to reduce Bond amount. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK and CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY's Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant, For Order To Furnish Security And For Pre-Filing Order is GRANTED. Moving party demonstrated that Plaintiff is a vexatious litigant within the meaning of CCP 391 and that a bond shall be required under CCP 391.1. Plaintiff shall post a $50,000 bond within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
